scripts.dev: npm run build -w @queue-monitor/shared && npm run build -w @queue-monitor/node && concurrently -k -n api,demo,web "npm run dev -w @queue-monitor/api" "npm run dev -w @queue-monitor/demo-service" "npm run dev -w @queue-monitor/web"
scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w @queue-monitor/shared && npm run dev -w @queue-monitor/api
scripts.dev:demo: npm run build -w @queue-monitor/shared && npm run build -w @queue-monitor/node && npm run dev -w @queue-monitor/demo-service
scripts.build: npm run build -w @queue-monitor/shared && npm run build -w @queue-monitor/node && npm run build -w @queue-monitor/api && npm run build -w @queue-monitor/demo-service && npm run build -w @queue-monitor/web && npm run typecheck:scripts
scripts.test: npm run test:demo-scripts && npm run test -w @queue-monitor/shared && npm run test -w @queue-monitor/node && npm run test -w @queue-monitor/api && npm run test -w @queue-monitor/demo-service && npm run test -w @queue-monitor/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @queue-monitor/shared && npm run build -w @queue-monitor/node && npm run typecheck -w @queue-monitor/api && npm run typecheck -w @queue-monitor/demo-service && npm run typecheck -w @queue-monitor/web && npm run typecheck:scripts
scripts.infra:stack:up: docker compose --env-file infra/.env -f infra/docker-compose.yml --profile apps up --build -d
